1.description: (Color online) Coefficient Plots Notes . In panels (a) and (b), we plot coefficients with standard error bars for pre- and postperiods to the 2010 New York FCA amendment. We obtain these coefficients from regressions of SETR (panel (a)) and adjSETR (panel (b)) on the interaction of Treat and indicator variables coded to one for each year except for 2009. We use 2009 as the benchmark year. We include controls and fixed effects. We overlay 90% intervals on estimated effects. The solid gray lines represent the average pre- and posttreatment effects. In panel (c), we plot coefficients with standard error bars for pre- and postperiods to the New York Attorney General tax whistleblower enforcement press releases during our sample period. We obtain these coefficients from a regression of SETR on the interaction of Treat_ind and indicator variables coded to one for each event time except for event time t − 1. The event time −1 serves as the benchmark year. We include controls and fixed effects. We overlay 90% confidence intervals on estimated effects. The solid lines represent the average pre- and posttreatment effects. (a) Coefficient plots using SETR as the dependent variable. (b) Coefficient plots using adjSETR as the dependent variable. (c) Coefficient plots using SETR as the dependent variable for the New York Attorney General tax whistleblower press releases.
